external_basis.claim: Repeated failures should change future calls rather than blindly retrying protected operations.
external_basis.label: circuit_breaker_pattern

external_basis.claim: Execution environments expose runner/context/debug evidence that can be used for capability-aware decisions.
external_basis.label: github_runner_contexts_debugging

external_basis.claim: Systems should degrade gracefully and label limitations rather than overclaim blocked capabilities.
external_basis.label: sre_graceful_degradation

hard_rules: Never claim a capability is unavailable without a direct same-turn probe or existing same-turn hard-fail cache.
Never claim primary proof when only fallback/proxy proof exists.
Prefer known-working fallback methods over repeated known-hard-fail methods unless conditions changed.
Append capability decisions to a reliability ledger with evidence paths.
Stage exit must produce NEXT_STAGE_COPY_PROMPT.md and, when successful, a short-name BOOTABLE_FULL_AUTHORITY export.
purpose: Generalize sandbox-first capability resolution across MetaBlooms tasks so flaky tools are probed, ranked, attempted, fallback-labeled, and logged instead of assumed or repeatedly retried.
